assessor_raw: The Learning-to-Rank Marketplace Search experiment is methodologically rigorous. Temporal split is appropriate for non-stationary data. Label construction uses pairwise implicit feedback with principled position-bias mitigation. The LambdaRank/LambdaMART training objective aligns with NDCG@10 evaluation. Both models receive equivalent tuning and seller re-ranking. Secondary metrics (IPW NDCG, tail query NDCG, seller quality lift, cross-seller stratification) comprehensively address alternative explanations. The preprocessing fit-apply separation is correctly enforced. The scope statement properly bounds claims to offline evaluation. Verdict: defense_wins.
